reason: Recent experiments are over-concentrated in family 'take-profit'; try a different mechanism/family before more local tuning.

changes.reason: Batch C isolated pullback distance experiment. The worst pullback tail entered with ES-VWAP distance 7.84, while pullback_long's median ES-VWAP distance is 6.71 and the 8-12 ES-VWAP bucket has the strongest average PnL. Raising the pullback-specific cap from 10 to 12 tests whether the leader base was under-allowing the higher-quality 8-12 continuation band without touching global vetoes or 1DTE/no-0DTE routing.

Current pullback dynamic TP max is 4 while pullback_long median MFE is 106.2 dollars and the profile is the main PnL engine. Moving to the grid value 5 tests whether pullback winners can monetize more upside and offset deep-heat recovery cost without changing entry count materially.

Current fixed TP distance is 2 while realized median TP is already about 3.35 from dynamic targeting. Setting the pullback base TP to 2.5 aligns with the grid midpoint and should reduce premature small exits while retaining scalper behavior.

recommendation.expected_effect: This should improve pullback_long profit capture and pnl_per_exposure_hour by allowing the profitable 8-12 ES-VWAP continuation band and giving core pullback winners modestly more target room. Trade count should remain close to baseline because this is not a broad veto. Main risk is longer holds or worse MAE if the extra VWAP distance admits more deep-heat pullbacks; reject if net profit remains below 98% of run_001, pnl/exposure falls, or pullback worst MAE worsens.
recommendation.label: pullback-distance-profit-capture
recommendation.rationale: Choose Batch C because the next legal one-family move must avoid hard-saturated prior keysets like 1DTE tightening, no-0DTE pruning, and call-wall loosening. pullback_long is the dominant VALID_0DTE edge with 31 trades, $2413.20 PnL, 192.96 PnL/exposure hour, and 38.5% of total PnL. Broad structure gating is rejected because score-3 and negative-structure buckets are profitable and would retain too little PnL. This experiment is profile-specific and profit-capture oriented, not global pruning or stop-loss behavior.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: pullback_long produced $2413.20 across 31 VALID_0DTE trades but owns the global worst MAE at -638.75. Broad ES-structure pruning would retain only 71.6% PnL and leave worst MAE unchanged, so a separate pullback regime is more appropriate than tightening the parent profile.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Pullback Deep-Heat Split
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Current config keys cannot observe delayed early-MFE behavior at entry, and parent tightening may remove profitable weak-structure pullbacks.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: VALID_0DTE pullback entries with weak structure distances, low VWAP acceleration, near-zero early MFE diagnostics, and delayed TP behavior.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Retain at least 90% of pullback_long PnL while improving pullback worst MAE from -638.75 toward <= -527 and improving combined PnL/exposure hour.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: All 24 bad-MAE rows are covered by the extended-VWAP-rejection near-miss family, but protected extended-VWAP winners exist. Broad VWAP-extension filters would cut profitable fast winners, so the better design is a scoped state split or surgical veto experiment when legal keys are available.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Extended VWAP Rejection State Split
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Boundary expansion could block clean extended-VWAP winners and suppress fast PnL if applied as a blunt global veto.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: Entries matching existing extended-VWAP-rejection near misses, especially max-rsi-slope, max-vwap-distance, and min-pullback-from-high failures.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Worst MAE improves toward <= -527 with retained total PnL >=97%, fast_under_15m trades down <=3, and protected extended_vwap_winners mostly retained.
